title: zehneria scabra subsp. scabra
intro: Zehneria scabra subsp. scabra, also known as the Rough Zehneria or Indian Bitters, is a plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. It is a herb that has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Zehneria scabra subsp. scabra include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and cough. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
